**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Nanjing Siyinke Automation Technology Co., Ltd. presents a 'heavy industry hallucination' caused by the stacking of commercial registration terms. The system has thoroughly cleared the underlying fictional Apple Inc. consumer electronics empire setting. Officials directly characterized it as high-end 'Electronic Device Manufacturing.' Browsing its business license, the first half reads like a giant heavy equipment factory: from 'material handling equipment manufacturing' to 'industrial robot installation,' and further to 'industrial automatic control system device manufacturing.' However, the physical world probe presents an extremely absurd contrast: the enterprise's paid-in capital is only 150,000 RMB, the 2024 insured headcount is a mere '1 person,' and even more fatally, its registered address is 'Room 602,' No. 2 Qingyayuan, Qinhuai District, Nanjing City. This is a highly typical high-rise room in a residential compound (or commercial-residential apartment). The boss (Guo Yueqin) alone, with 150,000 RMB, manufacturing industrial robots and material handling equipment in a sixth-floor residence? This is impossible. Extracting the honest terms from the latter half of the license, the diagnostic conclusion is drawn: this is a typical One-Person System Integrator & Reseller for industrial control equipment/automation software. Its primary business is taking freelance jobs or proxy-selling power distribution switches and instrumentation, and writing some integration code for industrial control systems on a laptop. The so-called 'manufacturing' is entirely a forced modifier used solely to issue equipment invoices or pass compliance.
